namespace = dm_reform

dm_reform.1101 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1101.t
	desc = dm_reform.1101.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1101_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1101_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = wrathful has_trait = vengeful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = content } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1101.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_martial_value <= 12 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -12
							SUPPORT = -6
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2101 days = 1 }
				}
				45 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -10
							SUPPORT = -5
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2101 days = 1 }
				}
				19 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 7
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2101 days = 1 }
				}
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 9
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2101 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_martial_value <= 17 }

		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response
		trigger = { OR = {
			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
			scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer ?= { OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
		} }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1101.trait_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_trait_check_martial_value <= 7 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -12
							SUPPORT = -6

dm_reform.1102 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1102.t
	desc = dm_reform.1102.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1102_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1102_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = wrathful has_trait = vengeful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = arbitrary } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = trusting has_trait = compassionate } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1102.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_intrigue_value <= 12 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -12
							SUPPORT = -6
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2102 days = 1 }
				}
				45 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -10
							SUPPORT = -5
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2102 days = 1 }
				}
				19 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 7
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2102 days = 1 }
				}
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 9
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2102 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_intrigue_value <= 17 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:very_bad }
			}
			random_list = {
				25 = {

dm_reform.1103 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1103.t
	desc = dm_reform.1103.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1103_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1103_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = wrathful has_trait = vengeful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = forgiving has_trait = honest } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = shy has_trait = callous has_trait = vengeful has_trait = deceitful } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }

			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = brave has_trait = stubborn } }
modifier = { add = -20 OR = { has_trait = humble has_trait = trusting has_trait = content } }

				add = 20

					value >= 50

					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}

modifier = {

				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}

		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1104_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

				}

		}
	}

						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2104 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}

			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:overwhelming }

				1 = {

							PROGRESS = -12

			base = 40
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = brave has_trait = stubborn } }
modifier = { add = -20 OR = { has_trait = humble has_trait = trusting has_trait = content } }

	}

	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1106_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = humble } }
				}

			}
		}
	}

		}

			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}

dm_reform.1107 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1107.t
	desc = dm_reform.1107.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1107_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1107_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = wrathful has_trait = vengeful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = lazy has_trait = arbitrary has_trait = generous } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }

			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}

modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50

				opinion = {

					value < 0

						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes

				9 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -10
							SUPPORT = -5
							RESULT = failure
						}

					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2107 days = 1 }

							RESULT = success

							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2107 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = -30 has_trait = greedy }
		}
	}

					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}
	}

dm_reform.1109 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1109.t
	desc = dm_reform.1109.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1109_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1109_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = greedy has_trait = lazy has_trait = craven } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = lazy has_trait = arbitrary has_trait = generous } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1109.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_stewardship_value <= 8 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response
		trigger = { OR = {
			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
			scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer ?= { OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
		} }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1109.trait_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_trait_check_stewardship_value <= 3 }

dm_reform.1110 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1110.t
	desc = dm_reform.1110.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1110_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1110_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = greedy has_trait = lazy has_trait = craven } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = content } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1110.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_martial_value <= 8 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }
				}
				45 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -5
							SUPPORT = -2
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }
				}
				19 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 5
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }
				}
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 7
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_martial_value <= 13 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:very_bad }
			}
			random_list = {
				25 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }
				}
				40 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {

				30 = {

						}

					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }

					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2110 days = 1 }

dm_reform.1111 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1111.t
	desc = dm_reform.1111.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1111_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1111_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = greedy has_trait = lazy has_trait = craven } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = arbitrary } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = trusting has_trait = compassionate } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response

	}

			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = brave has_trait = stubborn } }
modifier = { add = -20 OR = { has_trait = humble has_trait = trusting has_trait = content } }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.reformer_response
		trigger = { scope:dm_reform_story = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes } }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1112.reformer_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_reformer_check_learning_value <= 8 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2112 days = 1 }

				45 = {

		name = dm_reform.event.resource_response

			piety >= 150

	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1113.t

	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1113_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

		}

					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = forgiving has_trait = honest } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = shy has_trait = callous has_trait = vengeful has_trait = deceitful } }

			}
		}
	}

			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}

dm_reform.1114 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1114.t
	desc = dm_reform.1114.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1114_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1114_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_opponents
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = greedy has_trait = lazy has_trait = craven } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = humble } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response

					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -5
							SUPPORT = -2
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
				50 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 5
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
				30 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 7
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:overwhelming }
			}
			random_list = {
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
				9 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -5
							SUPPORT = -2
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
				50 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 5
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
				40 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 7
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2114 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform.1115 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1115.t
	desc = dm_reform.1115.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1115_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1115_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }
				50 = {
					trigger = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes }
					var:dm_reform_reformer = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1115.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_learning_value <= 4 }

					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2115 days = 1 }
				}
				50 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2115 days = 1 }
				}
				40 = {

							PROGRESS = 4
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2115 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {

			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }
			scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer ?= { OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }

dm_reform.1116 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1116.t
	desc = dm_reform.1116.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1116_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1116_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }

		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response
		trigger = { OR = {
			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
			scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer ?= { OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
		} }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1116.trait_tt

			limit = { dm_reform_trait_check_stewardship_value <= -1 }

dm_reform.1117 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1117.t
	desc = dm_reform.1117.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1117_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1117_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }
				50 = {
					trigger = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes }
					var:dm_reform_reformer = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1117.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_intrigue_value <= 4 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}

dm_reform.1118 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1118.t
	desc = dm_reform.1118.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1118_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1118_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }
				50 = {
					trigger = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes }
					var:dm_reform_reformer = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }

		name = dm_reform.event.resource_response

			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = brave has_trait = stubborn } }
modifier = { add = -20 OR = { has_trait = humble has_trait = trusting has_trait = content } }
		}

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.reformer_response
		trigger = { scope:dm_reform_story = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes } }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1119.reformer_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_reformer_check_diplomacy_value <= 4 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2119 days = 1 }
				}
				45 = {

						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2119 days = 1 }
				}
				1 = {

							PROGRESS = 4
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes

					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2119 days = 1 }

				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:very_bad }

						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2119 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform.1120 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1120.t
	desc = dm_reform.1120.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1120_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1120_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }
				50 = {
					trigger = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes }
					var:dm_reform_reformer = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1120.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_prowess_value <= 4 }

						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2120 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform.1121 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1121.t
	desc = dm_reform.1121.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1121_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1121_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			story_owner = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_ruler }
			random_list = {
				50 = { scope:dm_reform_ruler = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor } }
				50 = {
					trigger = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes }
					var:dm_reform_reformer = { save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor }
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1121.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_learning_value <= 4 }

			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50

				opinion = {

					value >= 0
				}

					opinion = {

		}
		else = {
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:overwhelming }
			}
			random_list = {
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2121 days = 1 }
				}
				9 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 0
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2121 days = 1 }
				}
				50 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2121 days = 1 }
				}
				40 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 4
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2121 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 30 has_trait = zealous }
modifier = { add = -30 has_trait = cynical }
		}
	}
}

		}

					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2122 days = 1 }
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response

			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = forgiving has_trait = honest } }

dm_reform.1123 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1123.t
	desc = dm_reform.1123.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1123_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1123_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = generous has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = patient } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = impatient has_trait = arbitrary has_trait = fickle } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1123.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_learning_value <= 8 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -4
							SUPPORT = -1
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}

							RESULT = great_success

modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50

modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response
		trigger = { OR = {
			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }
			scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer ?= { OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }
		} }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1123.trait_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_trait_check_learning_value <= 3 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -4
							SUPPORT = -1
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
					trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.2123 days = 1 }
				}

					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0

						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}

dm_reform.1124 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1124.t
	desc = dm_reform.1124.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1124_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1124_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = generous has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = patient } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = lazy has_trait = arbitrary has_trait = generous } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1124.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_stewardship_value <= 8 }

					value >= 0

						value >= 50

dm_reform.1125 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1125.t
	desc = dm_reform.1125.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1125_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1125_next_day add = 3650 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = generous has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = patient } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = content } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1125.ruler_tt

modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = just has_trait = honest } }
		}

		name = dm_reform.event.resource_response

	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1126_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

				}

		}
	}

				}
				20 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 12
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_check_intrigue_value <= 18 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:strong }
			}
			random_list = {
				5 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -4
							SUPPORT = -1
							RESULT = disaster
						}

					}
				}
				15 = {

							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				50 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 10
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				30 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 12
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:overwhelming }
			}
			random_list = {
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -4
							SUPPORT = -1
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes

				}
				9 = {

							PROGRESS = -2
							SUPPORT = 0
							RESULT = failure

							PROGRESS = 10
							SUPPORT = 2
							RESULT = success

							PROGRESS = 12
							SUPPORT = 3
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = -30 has_trait = greedy }
		}
	}

		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1127_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1127_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters

					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = generous has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = patient } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = humble } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}

dm_reform.1128 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1128.t
	desc = dm_reform.1128.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1128_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1128_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = generous has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = patient } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = forgiving has_trait = honest } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = shy has_trait = callous has_trait = vengeful has_trait = deceitful } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1128.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_diplomacy_value <= 8 }

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.resource_response
		trigger = {
			prestige >= 150
			trigger_if = { limit = { is_ai = yes } prestige >= 300 }
		}
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1128.resource_tt
		add_prestige = -150
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_check_diplomacy_value <= -2 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {

			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}

	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1129.t
	desc = dm_reform.1129.desc
	theme = court

	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1129_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1129_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10

					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = deceitful has_trait = paranoid has_trait = cynical has_trait = arbitrary } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = honest has_trait = trusting has_trait = compassionate } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}

dm_reform.1130 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1130.t
	desc = dm_reform.1130.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1130_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1130_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = brave has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn has_trait = just } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = gregarious has_trait = compassionate has_trait = forgiving has_trait = honest } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = shy has_trait = callous has_trait = vengeful has_trait = deceitful } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}

dm_reform.1131 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1131.t
	desc = dm_reform.1131.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1131_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1131_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = brave has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn has_trait = just } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = impatient has_trait = arbitrary has_trait = fickle } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }

			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = ambitious has_trait = brave has_trait = stubborn } }
modifier = { add = -20 OR = { has_trait = humble has_trait = trusting has_trait = content } }
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.reformer_response
		trigger = { scope:dm_reform_story = { dm_reform_has_reformer_trigger = yes } }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1131.reformer_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_reformer_check_learning_value <= 12 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				45 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = -5
							SUPPORT = -2
							RESULT = failure
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				19 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 17
							SUPPORT = 5
							RESULT = success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				1 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {
						dm_reform_apply_counter_change_effect = {
							PROGRESS = 19
							SUPPORT = 6
							RESULT = great_success
						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_reformer_check_learning_value <= 17 }

		ai_chance = {
			base = 30
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = trusting has_trait = humble has_trait = content } }
modifier = { add = -30 OR = { has_trait = paranoid has_trait = arrogant } }
modifier = {
				add = 20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 50
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.trait_response

			scope:dm_reform_story.story_owner = { OR = { has_trait = patient has_trait = zealous has_trait = cynical has_trait = just } }

		} }
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }

	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.resource_response
		trigger = {
			piety >= 200
			trigger_if = { limit = { is_ai = yes } piety >= 400 }
		}
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1131.resource_tt
		add_piety = -200
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_check_learning_value <= 2 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }

							SUPPORT = 6

						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		ai_chance = {
			base = 20
			modifier = { add = 30 OR = { has_trait = generous has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
modifier = { add = 30 has_trait = zealous }
modifier = { add = -30 has_trait = cynical }
		}
	}

		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1132_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = temperate has_trait = just has_trait = greedy } }

				}

		}
	}

				add = 10
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value >= 0
				}
				NOT = {
					opinion = {
						target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
						value >= 50
					}
				}
			}
modifier = {
				add = -20
				opinion = {
					target = scope:dm_reform_story.var:dm_reform_reformer
					value < 0
				}
			}
		}
	}

dm_reform.1133 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1133.t
	desc = dm_reform.1133.desc
	theme = court
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	immediate = {
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1133_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }
			change_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1133_next_day add = 1825 }
		}
		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			random_in_list = {
				variable = dm_reform_supporters
				weight = {
					base = 10
					modifier = { add = 60 OR = { has_trait = diligent has_trait = brave has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn has_trait = just } }
					modifier = { add = 25 OR = { has_trait = brave has_trait = wrathful has_trait = ambitious has_trait = stubborn } }
					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = content } }
				}
				save_scope_as = dm_reform_actor
			}
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.event.ruler_response
		show_as_unavailable = { always = yes }
		custom_tooltip = dm_reform.1133.ruler_tt
		if = {
			limit = { dm_reform_ruler_check_martial_value <= 12 }
			scope:dm_reform_story = {
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_probability_tier value = flag:disaster }
			}
			random_list = {
				35 = {
					scope:dm_reform_story = {

							PROGRESS = -7
							SUPPORT = -3
							RESULT = disaster

							PROGRESS = 17
							SUPPORT = 5

						}
						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes
					}
				}
				1 = {

							PROGRESS = 19
							SUPPORT = 6
							RESULT = great_success

						dm_reform_check_immediate_outcome_effect = yes

				}

			}

							PROGRESS = -7

	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.1134.t
	desc = dm_reform.1134.desc

		scope:dm_reform_story = {
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_event_1134_next_day value = var:dm_reform_elapsed_days }

		}

					base = 10

					modifier = { add = -8 OR = { has_trait = craven has_trait = calm has_trait = humble } }
				}

		}
	}

modifier = { add = 20 OR = { has_trait = arrogant has_trait = brave } }
modifier = { add = -20 has_trait = humble }
		}
	}
}

		}

				15 = {

dm_reform.2101 = {
	type = character_event
	title = dm_reform.chain_followup.t
	desc = dm_reform.chain_followup.desc
	theme = court
	trigger = {
		exists = scope:dm_reform_story
		exists = scope:dm_reform_actor
		scope:dm_reform_actor = { is_alive = yes }
	}
	on_trigger_fail = { trigger_event = dm_reform.0231 }
	left_portrait = scope:dm_reform_actor
	option = {
		name = dm_reform.chain_followup.a
		trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.3101 days = 2 }
	}
}
